text.title: Business Storytelling Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: message type == decision or change or case-study?

conclusion.verdict: use Pyramid — lead with the recommendation
use Pixar — because-of-that chain earns buy-in
use SCQA — frame complication then answer
use Pyramid + 1-line opening outcome (X% increase / Y saved)

text.example: message_type=decision → conclusion answer-first → Pyramid → lead with 'retire line B in Q3' → 3 supports + so-whats.
